home.discoverMyStory: Discover my story, my motivations and my vision for the technological future in Africa

home.welcomeMessage: Welcome to Pierre Sikati's portfolio. I am a passionate fullstack developer, specializing in creating high-performance web and mobile applications.
home.subtitle: Fullstack Developer | Cybersecurity | AI
home.heroDescription: I am a passionate fullstack developer specializing in creating high-performance web and mobile applications, with a strong interest in cybersecurity and artificial intelligence. I love creating innovative and efficient solutions.
home.aboutBio1: I am currently in my 3rd year of Computer Science, with a solid background in algorithms, data structures, object-oriented programming and software architecture. My academic background has allowed me to develop a deep understanding of the fundamental principles of computer science.
home.aboutBio2: Originally from Cameroon, I am driven by the conviction that technology can transform African societies. My goal is to become an IT expert capable of designing innovative, secure and adapted solutions for African contexts.
home.visionText: To become a recognized IT expert, capable of designing innovative and secure solutions that transform African societies. I believe in a future where technology serves as a lever for sustainable development and social inclusion.
home.skillsDescription: Varied technical skills tailored to your project needs

footer.description: Passionate Web & Mobile Developer creating innovative solutions.
